title: Product design analysis from context and screenshots
use_when: Product design analysis from context and screenshots. Use when the user needs a product workflow for design & prototyping related to product design analysis from context and screenshots. Trigger terms: pm, ux, design, critique, analysis.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Product design analysis from context and screenshots when the request is mainly metric diagnosis, pricing, GTM, or implementation planning without UX evidence; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Product design analysis from context and screenshots UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: Product design analysis from context and screenshots fits Design work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs Product design analysis from context and screenshots UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Product design analysis from context and screenshots UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Product design analysis from context and screenshots as generic Design advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Product design analysis from context and screenshots when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $product-design-analysis-from-context-and-screenshots to turn this design context into a decision-ready Product design analysis from context and screenshots UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: Product design analysis from context and screenshots UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
